sections.paragraph:
ϰατανοέω [κατά, νοέω] This verb evokes a combination of visual and mental aspects: ‘pay close attention (to)’

—a. with focus on optical aspect take close look at Ac 7:31f; Js 1:23; notice Ac 27:39.

—b. w. focus on reflection think about, consider Mt 7:3; Lk 6:41; 12:24, 27; Ro 4:19; Hb 3:1; see through Lk 20:23.
